best-practice-synthesis-routing.reason: Queues a v10.15 clarification of rule #2 for owner paste; the live PI is unchanged and no synthesis is written. The clarification expresses the existing rule as a capability floor per the ratified DR.

bias_direction: Same self-serving exposure as the DR it implements: queuing a PI clarification that authorizes the current model class for synthesis. The queue entry is non-binding (owner-paste required), which bounds the risk — nothing in the live PI changes from this commit, so the bias cannot take effect without an explicit owner action.
independent_reviewer_counterclaim: A reviewer might note that queuing the clarification pre-commits the owner toward accepting it by framing it as already-ratified. Counter: the entry explicitly states it goes live only on owner paste and records the DR as its basis; the owner retains a veto at paste time, and the rationale is auditable against the DR.
